sentences.sentence: Sign-in sheets are kept at the front desk.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (sheets, kept, desk)

sentences.sentence: Drop-in sessions for math run through every afternoon.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking between words (run_through); consonant cluster (-ns in sessions)

sentences.sentence: Writing consultants can review your drafts at the side tables.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-nts in consultants, dr- in drafts)

sentences.sentence: Appointments are scheduled automatically through the online portal.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables (automatically); consonant cluster (-nts in appointments)

sentences.sentence: Quiet study rooms can be reserved for small groups.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress placement in compound noun (study rooms); consonant cluster (-ps in groups)

sentences.sentence: Printed handouts for each subject sit on the resource shelves.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-nts in handouts, -lvs in shelves)

sentences.sentence: If you are not sure which tutor to see, check the schedule posted by the main entrance.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: conditional intonation (rising if-clause, falling main clause); final clusters at phrase boundaries (sure_which, posted_by)

sentences.sentence: Scripts are stacked on the table.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (scr- in scripts, -ckt in stacked)

sentences.sentence: Your costume fitting is included in tonight's schedule.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress in compound noun (costume fitting); linking (is_included)

sentences.sentence: We will run through the opening scene a few times.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking between words (run_through); consonant cluster (scn- blend in scene)

sentences.sentence: Stage props are stored behind the back curtain.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (st- in stage, str- in stored, -ps in props)

sentences.sentence: The lighting cues can be reviewed with the crew upstairs.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (can_be_reviewed); consonant cluster (cr- in crew, -rs in upstairs)

sentences.sentence: Movement marks for each actor are taped across the floor.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-rks in marks, -ct in actor); linking (taped_across)

sentences.sentence: When you finish your scene, gather backstage and look over the changes to your blocking.
sentences.structure: fronted temporal clause with compound directive
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary (finish_your); final clusters at phrase boundaries (changes_to)

sentences.sentence: Tissues are placed by the door.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (placed, door)

sentences.sentence: Walk-in hours start at nine.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-lk in walk, st- in start)

sentences.sentence: The pharmacy is down the hall.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (down, hall); linking (down_the)

sentences.sentence: Insurance forms can be picked up at this counter.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (can_be, picked_up); consonant cluster (-rms in forms)

sentences.sentence: Appointment results are sent through the patient app.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-nts in appointments, -lts in results); linking (sent_through)

sentences.sentence: First-aid supplies are kept behind the reception desk.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-rst in first, -pl in supplies, -sk in desk)

sentences.sentence: If you cannot find the lab for your blood test, follow the blue signs toward the east wing.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary (if_you, find_the); stress-timing across 18 words; final clusters (test_follow)
